target.title: refactor(cron): split service timer helpers
target.body:
## Summary

- split cron timer helper concerns into focused service modules for agent watchdog cleanup, execution error text, failure alerts, task-run ledger handling, and manual wake dispatch
- update cron ops and wake tests to import those helpers directly while preserving timer compatibility re-exports
- keep behavior unchanged; this is cleanup following the cron delivery-target fix

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/cron/service/wake.test.ts src/cron/service/timer.test.ts src/cron/service/timer.regression.test.ts src/cron/service/ops.test.ts src/cron/service/ops.regression.test.ts`
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/cron/service/timer.ts src/cron/service/agent-watchdog.ts src/cron/service/ops.ts src/cron/service/wake.test.ts src/cron/service/execution-errors.ts src/cron/service/failure-alerts.ts src/cron/service/task-runs.ts src/cron/service/wake.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `pnpm check:changed` via Blacksmith Testbox `tbx_01ksxg68x9vwjp5kzefcyvk0tw`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` clean: no accepted/actionable findings
target.author: steipete
